name: istio_requests_total
definition: Total service requests seen by Istio and the main denominator for request-based health views
absence_means: No request traffic or request telemetry missing
cardinality_footguns: double-count risk if source and destination reporter are mixed

name: istio_request_duration_milliseconds
definition: Request latency histogram in milliseconds for mesh traffic used for p95 and mean latency views
absence_means: Latency histogram not scraped or service not receiving traffic
cardinality_footguns: do not group by destination workload and destination service together on overview charts

name: istio_request_bytes
definition: Histogram of request payload sizes in bytes used to explain traffic mix and latency changes
absence_means: Request-size telemetry missing or protocol mix not represented
cardinality_footguns: high-cardinality service plus app breakdowns can clutter charts

name: istio_response_bytes
definition: Histogram of response payload sizes in bytes used to identify heavy responders and egress-heavy services
absence_means: Response-size telemetry missing or protocol mix not represented
cardinality_footguns: avoid layering response size with response code and workload in the same chart

name: istio_request_messages_total
definition: Total gRPC request messages sent from the client side of a gRPC exchange
absence_means: Either no gRPC traffic or gRPC-specific metric absent on this path
cardinality_footguns: group only by bounded destination service or namespace keys

name: istio_response_messages_total
definition: Total gRPC response messages sent from the server side of a gRPC exchange
absence_means: Either no gRPC traffic or gRPC-specific metric absent on this path
cardinality_footguns: group only by bounded destination service or namespace keys

name: pilot_endpoint_not_ready
definition: Number of endpoints known to Pilot that are not ready and may reduce destination reachability
absence_means: No current endpoint-readiness issue or pilot telemetry absent

name: pilot_dns_cluster_without_endpoints
definition: Count of DNS-discovered clusters with no endpoints available to Pilot
absence_means: No currently empty DNS-backed cluster set or no pilot telemetry

name: pilot_xds_pushes
definition: Total XDS pushes emitted by Pilot and a useful measure of control-plane churn
absence_means: No recent push activity or pilot telemetry missing
cardinality_footguns: type dimension can vary by push family but remains bounded

name: pilot_push_triggers
definition: Total push-trigger events recorded by Pilot showing why control-plane recalculations are happening
absence_means: No recent trigger activity or pilot telemetry missing

name: pilot_proxy_convergence_time
definition: Histogram of how long proxies take to converge on a pushed configuration
absence_means: No recent convergence samples or no pilot telemetry

name: pilot_proxy_queue_time
definition: Histogram of how long proxy update work waits in Pilot before processing
absence_means: No recent queue-time samples or no pilot telemetry

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: Direct cost metrics are not part of Istio standard telemetry so request and payload metrics remain the best proxy signals for mesh cost pressure
absence_means: No direct cost series should be expected
